title: Nicoletta & Burc
text:
SAVE THE DATE
July 15, 2027 · Wolfville, NS, Canada

title: Our Story
text:
Every love story is beautiful, but ours is our favorite.



 


2019

How We Met
It was a rainy Tuesday in October when Nicoletta walked into the campus coffee shop fifteen minutes late for a study group neither of them really needed. Burc had already ordered her favorite drink by accident, mistaking her for someone else — and somehow that mix-up turned into a three-hour conversation about everything except the material they were supposed to be reviewing.
Neither of them remembers a single thing from that exam. They remember everything about that conversation.





 


2020

The First Adventure
Their first real date was supposed to be dinner. It turned into a spontaneous road trip to the coast after Burc mentioned he’d never seen the ocean at sunrise. They drove through the night, arrived just as the sky turned pink, and sat on the hood of the car sharing gas-station coffee and a bag of half-melted chocolate.
It became a tradition. Every anniversary since, they’ve found a new sunrise to watch together.





 


2023

Building a Life Together
Between long work weeks, weekend hikes, and a small apartment that always somehow had too many houseplants, they built something steady and real. They learned each other’s coffee orders, favorite songs, and the exact right amount of space to give each other after a hard day.
Somewhere in the middle of all that ordinary, everyday life, they realized they’d found something extraordinary.





 


2026

The Proposal
On a quiet evening walk along the same coastline from their first trip together, Burc got down on one knee just as the sun dipped below the horizon — the same sunrise-chasing spirit that had defined their whole relationship, now closing the loop at sunset.
Nicoletta said yes before he even finished the question.




And now, we can’t wait to celebrate the next chapter with the people we love most.

title: Nicoletta & Burc
text:
SAVE THE DATE
July 15, 2027 · Wolfville, NS, Canada

title: Schedule
text:
THURSDAY, JULY 15, 2027

Join us to celebrate this special day with family and friends.
5:30 pm
Lightfoot & Wolfville Vineyards
11143 Nova Scotia Trunk 1, Wolfville, NS B4P 2R2, Canada
Wear what makes you feel comfortable — think garden party, not formalwear.
After the ceremony there will be a cocktail hour with light bites, followed by dinner among the vines. At the end of the night the celebration continues with dancing and drinks under the stars.

Map Add to Calendar

title: Travel & Where to Stay
text:
Everything you need to know to get to Wolfville — and where to rest your head once you’re here.




By Air
The closest airport is Halifax Stanfield International Airport (YHZ), about a 50-minute drive from Wolfville, Nova Scotia. Most major Canadian carriers fly into Halifax, with direct connections from Toronto, Montreal, and several U.S. cities.
By Car
If you’re driving, Wolfville sits just off Highway 101, roughly an hour from Halifax. We’d recommend renting a car at the airport — it’s the easiest way to get around the valley for the wedding weekend and beyond.
Shuttle
We’re arranging a shuttle between the recommended hotels and the venue for the day of the wedding — details and pickup times will be added here closer to the date. No need to worry about driving (or parking!) that evening.




We’ve pulled together a few options at different price points, all within a short drive of the venue. We recommend booking early — Wolfville is a small town and rooms fill up fast in the summer!



~10 minutes from the venue
A comfortable, mid-range option just outside town, with an on-site restaurant and pool. Popular with wedding guests — mention “Nicoletta & Burc” for a small group rate.
Book Now



~5 minutes from the venue
A charming heritage inn right in Wolfville, walking distance to shops and restaurants downtown. Boutique-style rooms, a bit more upscale.
Book Now



~7 minutes from the venue
A cozy bed & breakfast with a garden courtyard — a quieter, more intimate option for those who prefer a smaller property.
Book Now



Varies
For larger groups or families traveling together, the Wolfville and Grand Pré area has a wide range of Airbnb houses and cottages, many with vineyard views.
Browse Options






Wolfville is a small, walkable town, but the wedding venue is a short drive outside the downtown core. We’d suggest renting a car for the weekend, though we’re also happy to help coordinate carpools — just reach out if you’d like to be connected with other guests staying nearby.

title: RSVP
text:
We can’t wait to celebrate with you.


Please RSVP by June 1, 2027 so we can finalize seating and catering. If you have any questions in the meantime, reach out any time — details on our FAQs page.
